title: Kabhi Khushi Kabhie Gham
posterAlt: Kabhi Khushi Kabhie Gham (2001) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Years after his father disowns his adopted brother for marrying a woman of lower social standing, a young man goes on a mission to reunite his family.
synopsis: Released in 2001, Kabhi Khushi Kabhie Gham is a comedy and drama film from India and United Kingdom. It holds a solid 7.4 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2000s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 14A certification (CA rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
